name: The Business Process Management Benchmark Report: Achieving Real Results through Monitoring and Performance Measurement
description: Full 38pp Aberdeen BPM benchmark report by Peter Kastner. Survey of 160+ Global 5000 enterprises. Finds 94% of respondents moderately or very satisfied with BPM IT system results; average ROI 18%, ROA 10%, 9% revenue increase, 12% expense decrease, 2x IT value/budget ratio. BAM vs BPM-centric approaches equally valid; 57% chose all equally. Key challenge: management buy-in. BPM monitoring 'wags the tail' of BPM suite — monitoring component sufficient to pull through BPM suite sales. 42% still in planning stages. Sponsored by Tier1 Innovation and Value Chain International Limited.
